elf.reason: no application image is pinned for this design: the WO-37 realizer generates the BSP/contract layer only and AD-22 forbids invoking a compiler at realize time. The application source ships in this tree (app/main.c, app/la_jig8.h, app/la_jig8_capture.pio); link it against the shipped BSP with the RP2040 SDK and pin the resulting bytes via FirmwareArtifact.elf_content_hash to ship an image.
